mapper.sql: select relation_id, inviter_id, invitee_id, invite_code, invite_status, invite_time, certified_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from biz_invite_relation
mapper.select: select r.relation_id, r.inviter_id, r.invitee_id, r.invite_code, r.invite_status, r.invite_time, r.certified_time, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark, inviter.nickname as inviter_name, inviter.phone as inviter_phone, invitee.nickname as invitee_name, invitee.phone as invitee_phone from biz_invite_relation r left join biz_miniapp_user inviter on inviter.user_id = r.inviter_id left join biz_miniapp_user invitee on invitee.user_id = r.invitee_id where r.relation_id = #{relationId}
mapper.insert: insert into biz_invite_relation( inviter_id, invitee_id, invite_code, invite_status, invite_time, certified_time, create_by, remark, create_time )values( #{inviterId}, #{inviteeId}, #{inviteCode}, #{inviteStatus}, #{inviteTime}, #{certifiedTime}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
delete from biz_invite_relation where relation_id in
#{relationId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from biz_invite_relation where inviter_id = #{inviterId} and invite_status = '1'

select r.relation_id, r.inviter_id, r.invitee_id, r.invite_code, r.invite_status, r.invite_time, r.certified_time, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark, inviter.nickname as inviter_name, inviter.phone as inviter_phone, invitee.nickname as invitee_name, invitee.phone as invitee_phone from biz_invite_relation r left join biz_miniapp_user inviter on inviter.user_id = r.inviter_id left join biz_miniapp_user invitee on invitee.user_id = r.invitee_id where r.inviter_id = #{inviterId} order by r.relation_id desc
